zh.Holy Cross Churchyard, Ramsbury, Wiltshi: 英國英格蘭維爾爾拉姆斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Haute於1436年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，她的父親William Haute46歲，母親Joan Woodville31歲。她於1465年與George Darell在英國肯特謝爾文波內結婚。她去世於1473年1月8日享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾拉姆斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Haute于1436年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾时，她的父亲William Haute46岁，母亲Joan Woodville31岁。她于1465年与George Darell在英国肯特謝爾文波內结婚。她去世于1473年1月8日享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾拉姆斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Haute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname or status name from an argot word (thieves’ slang) in Bavaria and Austria for a peasant farmer (see   Hotz   1). Compare   Houts   and   Houtz  .

variants.name: Hotz
meanings: South German and Swiss German: from thieves' cant for a peasant or farmer, which in turn derives from an ancient Germanic personal name, Hugizo or Huzo, pet forms of a compound name formed with hug- as the first element (see, for example, Hubert , Hugh ).
South German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German hotzen ‘to run swiftly’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Haute was born in 1436, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Haute, was 46 and her mother, Joan Woodville, was 31. She married George Darell in 1465, in Shelvingborne, Kent, England. She died on 8 January 1473, at the age of 37, and was buried in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Haute est née en 1436, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Haute, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Joan Woodville, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé George Darell en 1465, à Shelvingborne, Kent, Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1473, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Haute 1436 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Haute 46 und ihre Mutter Joan Woodville 31. Sie hat 1465 in Shelvingborne, Kent, England George Darell geheiratet. Sie starb am 8. Januar 1473 im Alter von 37 Jahren und wurde in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Haute è nata il nel 1436 nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Haute, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Joan Woodville, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato George Darell nel 1465, nel Shelvingborne, Kent, England. Morì il 8 gennaio 1473, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Hauteが1436年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Hauteは46歳，母Joan Woodvilleは31歳であった。1465年にイギリスケントシェルヴィングボルンでGeorge Darellと結婚した。彼女は1473年1月8日に37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアラムスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Haute(이)가 1436년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Haute(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Woodville(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 켄트 셸빙본에서 George Darell(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1473년 1월 8일 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 램스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Haute nasceu em 1436, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Haute, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Joan Woodville, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com George Darell em 1465, em Shelvingborne, Kent, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1473, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Haute родилась в 1436 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Haute было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Woodville, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Darell в 1465 г. в местности шельвингборн, кэнт, Англия. Она умерла 8 января 1473 г. в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Haute nació en 1436, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Haute, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Joan Woodville, tenía 31 años. Se casó con George Darell en 1465, en Shelvingborne, Kent, Inglaterra. Murió el 8 de enero de 1473, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
